steps.t: The Variag blockade can be found in northern Taur Drúadan, near the western end of Maudhúl Grak. You should find a place in the Variag blockade where …
The Variag blockade can be found in northern Taur Drúadan. You should find and distract a large group of Variags at their blockade.

Herefara can be found in the War-stead of the Helmingas. You should speak with Herefara.
